sheet.text: Details Inspector Close Decision Metrics Boundary Evidence Selected replay window MEO continuity hold State 3 of 5 Replay UTC 2026-04-28T09:48:43.766Z Sim replay 00:57 / 01:54 Source provenance Evidence for the selected replay window. The scene narrative and sequence rail remain primary. Decision · State Evidence MEO 暫時接住 · MEO continuity hold 目前由 MEO 暫時接住，覆蓋面廣但延遲略高。模擬預期約 14 分鐘後會有新的候選 LEO 出現。 NowNow: MEO is the modeled primary hold state. WhyWhy: wider coverage carries continuity while LEO is not primary. NextNext: a LEO re-entry candidate appears in the following window. WatchWatch: higher-latency modeled class without measured latency values. The simulation holds continuity on the SES O3b mPOWER MEO context in window 3 of 5. This is wider-area continuity by model, not a measured failover. LEO returns as a candidate focus in the next window. Endpoint precision remains operator-family only. Metrics Modeled classes Modeled link quality: MEO hold class with higher-latency wording only. Communication time: derived remaining MEO hold window time. Unavailable measured data Unavailable measured data: no ping, iperf, ESTNeT/INET, DUT, latency, jitter, throughput, or packet-loss feed is connected to this route. Unavailable physical factors: rain, antenna, ITU/V group, and rain attenuation models are not connected in this scene. Boundary · Truth Boundary Truth boundary Simulation boundary: 13-actor demo, repo-owned projection, not measured truth. Service-layer boundary: modeled service handover, not native RF handover. Endpoint boundary: operator-family precision, not site-level gateway claim. Scale boundary: not >=500 LEO validation and not 24h hardware-GPU closeout. simulation outputoperator-family precisiondisplay-context actors Simulated display-context state, not an operator handover log.Source-lineaged display-context actors, not active serving satellites.Endpoint precision stays operator-family only.No active gateway assignment is claimed.No pair-specific teleport path is claimed.No measured latency, jitter, throughput, or continuity values are shown.No native RF handover is claimed.
